---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

background-image: url('libs/Images/00-Leviathan_Cover_55.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size70[**Today's Agenda**]

<br>

.size60[
Working on Paper 2
]

<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Fall 2023)
]]

???

### Prep for Class
1. Review Canvas submissions

<br>

**SLIDE**: Paper prompt




---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size45[.content-box-white[**Paper 2**]]

.size35[
Write a report on the **two countries** you have been studying that analyzes their recent experience of political violence

- **Section 1**: **Summarize AND analyze** the last eight years of political violence in your chosen countries (2015-2022) using **ALL FIVE of the data sources** reviewed in your first paper

- **Section 2**: Make an argument about what the **2022 PTS and CIRIGHTS codings** should be for your chosen countries based on the Country Reports on Human Rights Practices from the State Department and the AI country reports.
]

???

### Questions on the assignment?




---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-slate_v2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size40[.center[.content-box-white[**For Today**]]

.center[**Prepare at least three conclusions about each country's experience of political violence (with visualizations)**]

1. Tables 

2. Bar Plots

3. Line Plots

4. Scatter Plots
]

???

### Everybody ready to go with this?

<br>

**SLIDE**: Before we review your work, let's refresh our criteria of professional visualizations




---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-class: center
class: middle

.center[.size50[.content-box-purple[**Professional Visualizations**]]]

.size40[
1. Include an informative title

2. Add a figure label and caption

3. Identify the source(s)

4. Ensure the axis labels are clear and readable

5. Maximize the data-to-ink ratio

6. No chart junk!
]

???

### Questions on these?

<br>

**SLIDE**: Example




---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-slate_v2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

```{r, fig.retina=3, fig.asp=.618, fig.align='center', out.width='75%', fig.width=8}
# Combined data
d <- read_excel("../../Data/Combined_PTS_CIRIGHTS_VDem-2011-2020.xlsx", na = "NA")

d |>
  filter(Country == "Bahrain") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = physint_sum)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkblue", linewidth = 2) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2011:2022) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 8), breaks = 0:8) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Physical Integrity Rights (0-8)",
       caption = "Source: CIRIGHTS (2022)",
       title = "The Bahrani government's use of political violence has been increasing across time")
```

.size30[Figure 1: The use of political violence in Bahrain appears to be increasing dramatically over time. Higher scores on the CIRIGHTS index of physical integrity rights represents a worsening of government violence.]

???

### Questions on this?

<br>

**SLIDE**: Let's review the submissions!



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-slate_v2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-class: center
class: middle

.size45[
.content-box-purple[**Peer-Review Time!**]
1. Is each visualization sufficiently "professional"?
    - Informative title
    - Figure label and caption
    - Source information
    - Clear axes and labels
    - No chart junk or wasted space

2. Is each conclusion MORE than simple description?
]

???

*Split class into pairs*

Pairs, present your six visualizations and conclusions to your partner.

<br>

You have two jobs

- Each conclusion SHOULD describe the visualization, BUT

- You also have to take us deeper than that!

<br>

What do we learn from your chosen visualization?

- We aren't involved in your analysis work and often other people won't see what you see when you show the plot.

- Help us see the bigger or deeper picture.

<br>

### Questions?

- Let's go!

<br>

### Any really great examples to share?






---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle, center

.size65[.content-box-white[**For Next Class**]]

<br>

.size45[
Summarize the argument you will make in Section 2 of the paper (e.g. what SHOULD the 2022 PTS and CIRIGHTS codings be for your chosen countries based on the 2022 Country Reports on Human Rights Practices from the State Department and the AI country reports?).
]

???

Your argument MUST include evidence to support it!

- e.g. quantitative and qualitiative results!

<br>

### Questions?
